Maintenance and Upkeep System

Fleet maintenance, infrastructure upkeep, repairs per economy.md:3.9

Maintenance costs (economy.md:3.9):

  • Ships have maintenance costs based on class/tech (ships.toml)
  • Buildings have upkeep (construction.toml, facilities.toml)
  • Damaged infrastructure requires repair (construction.toml)
Ship Maintenance Costs (economy.md:3.9)Building and Facility MaintenanceInfrastructure RepairMaintenance Shortfall (economy.md:3.11)

Imports

types, ../../common/types/core, ../../common/types/units, ../config/ships_config, ../config/construction_config, ../config/facilities_config, ../config/ground_units_config, ../squadron, ../gamestate

Procs

proc applyMaintenanceShortfall(colony: var types.Colony; shortfall: int) {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

Apply consequences of maintenance shortfall Per economy.md:3.11

Shortfall consequences:

  • Infrastructure damage
  • Production loss
  • Prestige penalty

TODO: Implement proper shortfall mechanics For now, add infrastructure damage

proc applyRepair(colony: var types.Colony; repairPoints: int): float {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Apply repair points to damaged infrastructure Returns amount of damage repaired 
proc calculateColonyUpkeep(colony: gamestate.Colony): int {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Calculate total upkeep for all facilities and defenses at colony Includes: spaceports, shipyards, starbases, ground batteries, planetary shields, armies, marines 
proc calculateFleetMaintenance(ships: seq[(ShipClass, bool)]): int {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Calculate total fleet maintenance Args: seq of (ship class, is crippled) 
proc calculateRepairCost(damage: float): int {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

Calculate cost to repair infrastructure damage Per operations.md:6.2.6 - bombardment damages infrastructure

Repair cost scales with damage severity TODO: Define proper repair cost formula

proc getArmyUpkeep(): int {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get upkeep cost for army division per turn Per ground_units.toml 
proc getBuildingMaintenance(buildingType: string): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Get maintenance cost for building (legacy compatibility) Use specific functions above for new code 
proc getGroundBatteryUpkeep(): int {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

proc getMarineUpkeep(): int {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get upkeep cost for marine division per turn Per ground_units.toml 
proc getPlanetaryShieldUpkeep(): int {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get upkeep cost for planetary shield per turn Per construction.toml (regardless of SLD level) 
proc getShipMaintenanceCost(shipClass: ShipClass; isCrippled: bool): int {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

Get maintenance cost for ship per turn Per economy.md:3.9 and ships.toml upkeep_cost field

Uses actual upkeep values from ships.toml config
